name: Daniel Biss
bio: Daniel Biss is listed as a Democratic candidate in the 2026 IL-09 open-seat primary. He is the mayor of Evanston and previously served in the Illinois General Assembly. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)
prior_office: Mayor of Evanston; former state legislator

jacket.note: FEC candidate totals pending ETL import.

endorsements.significance: Incumbent endorsement noted in local reporting.
